ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the county data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded tests */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where tests were conducted */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "total_positive" INTEGER /* Total number of positive tests */,
  "individuals_tested" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals tested */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests out of total tests */,
  "testing_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing center where tests were conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of individuals tested */,
  "total_negative" INTEGER /* Total number of negative tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_testing_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_center_id") REFERENCES testing_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_data" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded recoveries */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where recoveries were reported */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recovered cases out of total cases */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of recovered individuals */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken for recovery in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_data" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded deaths */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where deaths occurred */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported */,
  "underlying_cause_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to underlying causes */,
  "contributing_factor_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths due to contributing factors */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Percentage of deaths out of total cases */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of deceased individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of deceased individuals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "active_cases" (
  "active_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each active case record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded active cases */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county with active cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases reported */,
  "case_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth in active cases */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of individuals with active cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of individuals with active cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("active_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_active_cases_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county for the demographics */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group category (e.g., 0-18, 19-35) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in this demographic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the demographic group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing center */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the testing center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the testing center */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the testing center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tests the center can handle per day */,
  "testing_methods" TEXT /* Methods of testing available at the center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the center's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_centers_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarantine_data" (
  "quarantine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarantine record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the quarantine data recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county with quarantine data */,
  "total_in_quarantine" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals currently in quarantine */,
  "quarantine_facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quarantine facility */,
  "quarantine_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of quarantine in days */,
  "quarantine_release_date" TEXT /* Date when individuals are expected to be released from quarantine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarantine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarantine_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where vaccinations occurred */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination center where vaccinations occurred */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("vaccination_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptom_data" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the symptom data recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county with symptom data */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom reported */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reporting this symptom */,
  "symptom_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of individuals reporting the symptom */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of individuals reporting the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptom_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the hospitalization data recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county with hospitalization data */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations reported */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where hospitalizations occurred */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of hospitalizations out of total cases */,
  "average_hospitalization_days" INTEGER /* Average number of days individuals are hospitalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact tracing record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the contact tracing data recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county with contact tracing data */,
  "total_contacts_traced" INTEGER /* Total number of contacts traced */,
  "tracing_effectiveness" REAL /* Percentage of contacts successfully traced */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of individuals traced */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of individuals traced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_tracing_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_data" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the outbreak data recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county with outbreak data */,
  "outbreak_description" TEXT /* Description of the outbreak */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the outbreak */,
  "outbreak_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the outbreak (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of individuals affected by the outbreak */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of individuals affected by the outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health official */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county they serve */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or title of the official */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the official */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the official's office */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the official */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the official's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_officials_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the center is located */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the vaccination center */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the vaccination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vaccinations the center can handle per day */,
  "vaccination_methods" TEXT /* Methods of vaccination available at the center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the center's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health policy */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the policy applies to */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the health policy */,
  "date_enacted" TEXT /* Date when the policy was enacted */,
  "policy_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the policy (e.g., Advisory, Mandatory) */,
  "policy_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the policy in days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policy information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_policies_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
